strategyResults.details: scanner.test.ts colocated regression fixed by commit 2cd7b9d

criteriaResults.evidence: tools=[Read, Bash, Grep, Glob] only; no Write/Edit/MultiEdit in frontmatter
Red Flags has 7 'About to' bullets (need >=8); Rationalization Prevention has 6 data rows (need >=7). Sprint 3 reference: bober-evaluator.md has 10 RF + 9 RP rows.
criteriaResults.feedback: Add >=1 Red Flag and >=1 Rationalization row reflecting code-review-specific failure modes

criteriaResults.evidence: SKILL.md description prefix correct; .bober/anti-patterns/ cited 12x including specific files; obra/superpowers attribution at line 7; What NOT to flag includes style/naming/theoretical risks/pre-existing code

code-reviewer-agent.ts uses createClient (L74) + runAgenticLoop (L144); pipeline.ts spawn at L330 inside if (evaluation.passed); try/catch L370-L382 logger.warn + proceeds; review-state.saveReview writes to .bober/reviews/<contractId>-review.md with mkdir -p
renderReviewMarkdown emits 6 sections in contract order at L185/187/191/209/224/239 with empty-section fallbacks ('No critical findings.' etc.)

All 3 contract assertions structurally hollow: (a) mocks runCodeReviewer then calls mock directly + asserts mock was called — tautological, never exercises pipeline.ts spawn path; (b) hand-builds markdown bypassing renderReviewMarkdown then calls saveReview directly; (c) replicates pipeline.ts try/catch inline instead of calling runSprintCycle — pipeline.ts L370-L382 untested. Generator was warned in evaluatorNotes about this exact anti-pattern.
criteriaResults.feedback: Rewrite tests to actually exercise pipeline.ts: (a) mock runAgenticLoop or runCodeReviewer at module boundary, call runSprintCycle, assert mock invoked with pipeline-passed args; (b) call renderReviewMarkdown with fixture + verify 6 headings, OR run full path with mocked agent return; (c) mock runCodeReviewer to throw, call runSprintCycle, assert sprint completes with status='passed'

criteriaResults.evidence: Grep of pipeline.ts reviewer block (L348-385) for iteration/updateContract/needs-rework/retry shows zero matches; critical findings count is used only in appendHistory details
All 4 strategies exit 0; 589 tests pass; scanner.test.ts confirmed restored
pipeline.ts +38/-0; code-reviewer-agent.ts +373 new; code-reviewer-agent.test.ts +283 new; evaluator-agent.ts zero diff; total sprint diff 8 files / 1198 ins / 1 del — additive only

generatorFeedback.reproduction: awk '/^## Red Flags/,/^## Rationalization/' agents/bober-code-reviewer.md | grep -c '^- About to' → 7

generatorFeedback.description: Test (a) tautological — mocks runCodeReviewer, calls mock directly, asserts mock was called. Never exercises pipeline.ts spawn path.
generatorFeedback.expected: Call runSprintCycle with mocked evaluator returning passed=true; assert mocked runCodeReviewer invoked with pipeline-passed args

generatorFeedback.description: Test (b) constructs markdown by hand, bypassing renderReviewMarkdown
generatorFeedback.expected: Call renderReviewMarkdown with ReviewResult fixture + assert 6 headings present
generatorFeedback.reproduction: L150-198 hardcodes reviewMarkdown string literal; renderReviewMarkdown never called

generatorFeedback.description: Test (c) replicates pipeline.ts try/catch inline; pipeline.ts L370-382 untested
generatorFeedback.expected: Mock runCodeReviewer to throw, call runSprintCycle, assert sprint.status stays 'passed' and pipeline does not throw
generatorFeedback.reproduction: L202-241 has hand-rolled try/catch in test body, not in production code path

summary: Sprint 5 fails 2/9 criteria. s5-c2: Red Flags 7<8 + Rationalization 6<7 (off by 1 each). s5-c6: all 3 tests are structurally hollow — pipeline.ts integration path completely untested despite evaluatorNotes warning. Other 7 criteria pass independently; all 4 strategies green at 589/4.
